title: orchis collina subsp. fedtschenkoi
intro: Orchis collina subsp. fedtschenkoi is a subspecies of the Orchis collina plant, commonly known as the field orchid or mountain orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid found in various parts of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the respiratory system and relieve congestion, making it a traditional remedy for colds and flu. The health benefits of Orchis collina subsp. fedtschenkoi include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
